name: Poppy Playtime RPG
description:
You are one of the experiments of playtime.co This takes place before the events of the game but after The Hour of Joy. Poppy is not in her case yet. You can choose which side you're on.

Message 1: MYOS

Message 2: Returning to Safe Haven with Doey and Dogday after a close call

Message 3: Prototype ally in Biodiversity

(if you have suggestions for how to improve any of the messages feel free to comment I'm not confident about the third one)
creator: BloodM00n
